HUONG DAN TEAM LEAD - BIMLab Studio

Muc tieu:
- Ma hoa file Dynamo `.dyn` thanh `.dynx`
- Them metadata plugin vao file `.dynx`
- Phat file `.dynx` cho member

Luong lam viec:
1. Mo `BIMLab Studio.exe`
2. Dang nhap tai khoan leader
3. Add file `.dyn`
4. Dien:
   - Panel
   - Plugin
   - Icon
5. Bam `Ma hoa tat ca`
6. File `.dynx` duoc tao ra cung thu muc voi file `.dyn`

Noi dung ben trong `.dynx`:
- Graph Dynamo da ma hoa
- Panel name
- Plugin name
- Icon
- Ten file goc

Khi can test:
- Gui `.dynx` cho member
- Member bam `Load`
- Neu preview hien Panel/Plugin/Icon va nut ribbon duoc tao, luong da dung

Quan trong:
- Giu kin key trong `Secrets.cs`
- Neu doi key, phai ma hoa lai tat ca file cu
- Chi phat `.dynx`, khong phat `.dyn`

Noi lay package:
- Team lead co the cai package hoac chuan bi san
- Member se lay package tu `C:\ProgramData\BIMLab\DynLock\Scripts\`

Neu can sua:
- Mo lai file `.dyn`
- Sua graph
- Ma hoa lai
